  "findings": [
    "Misinterpretation of utility locate mark colors, creating an extreme risk of utility strike during excavation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all excavation work immediately.",
    "Re-verify all utility markings with the local 811 one-call center and utility operators.",
    "Remark the site correctly according to the APWA/CGA national color code standard before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Misreading utility locate colors (such as mistaking gas for water or electric for sewer) violates standard 811/CGA Best Practices and poses an immediate, life-threatening safety hazard if excavation proceeds based on incorrect identification.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0",
    "APWA Uniform Color Code"
  ]
}
